warps.notes: Secret passage to Ruins of Alph — warp_event 3,3 RUINS_OF_ALPH_OUTSIDE 7. Upper northern warp.
Second passage to Ruins of Alph — warp_event 3,11 RUINS_OF_ALPH_OUTSIDE 8. Lower northern warp.
Staircase up to 1F — warp_event 7,19 UNION_CAVE_1F 1. Returns to warp index 1 on 1F (x5,y19).
Second staircase up to 1F — warp_event 3,33 UNION_CAVE_1F 2. Returns to warp index 2 on 1F (x3,y33).
Staircase down to B2F — warp_event 17,31 UNION_CAVE_B2F 1. Requires Surf to reach (water blocks path).

tile_layout.notes: Schematic from warp coordinates and object_event positions in UnionCaveB1F.asm. A water body is in the southern section; Surf is required to reach the B2F staircase at (17,31). The Ruins of Alph passages are in the upper-northwest. A Strength boulder at (7,10) blocks a shortcut. Actual block layout in UnionCaveB1F.blk.

trainers.name: Phillip
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: I've been lost for a long time… I don't mind it here, but I am soooo hungry!

trainers.name: Leonard
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: I live down here. You can, too, if you'd like. There's plenty of room, you see.

trainers.name: Andrew
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: Just me and my #MON. I'm delirious with joy.

trainers.name: Calvin
trainers.after_battle_dialogue: I should compile and announce my study findings. I might even become famous like PROF.ELM.

items.name: TM39 (Swift)
items.notes: TM39 teaches Swift, a Normal-type move that never misses.

obstacles.notes: Pushable boulder that blocks a passage. Requires HM04 Strength and the Plain Badge (Goldenrod Gym) to move.

cave.notes: Cave encounter table — 7 slots per time period. Source: johto_grass.asm def_grass_wildmons UNION_CAVE_B1F.

water.notes: Southern water body requires Surf to navigate. Grants access to B2F staircase. Source: johto_water.asm def_water_wildmons UNION_CAVE_B1F.

fishing.notes: No fishing data defined for Union Cave B1F in pokecrystal fish.asm.

events.description: The two northern warps at (3,3) and (3,11) lead to hidden passages that exit at Ruins of Alph Outside (warps 7 and 8). These allow the player to reach Ruins of Alph from the west side via Union Cave B1F.
events.notes: No event flag required — the passages are always open.

notes: Union Cave B1F is reached by stairs from 1F. It features a hidden connection to Ruins of Alph via two warp passages in the northwest (warp indices 1 and 2 of the floor). The southern section has a Surf-required water body; the staircase to B2F at (17,31) cannot be reached without Surf. A Strength boulder at (7,10) provides an optional shortcut when HM04 Strength is available. Four trainers guard the floor: Hikers Phillip (x9,y4) and Leonard (x16,y7) in the north, and Pokemaniacs Andrew (x5,y32) and Calvin (x17,y30) near the water. Items: TM39 Swift (x2,y16) and X Defend (x17,y23). Wild encounters on this floor are higher level than 1F — Zubat and Rattata dominate, with Wooper replacing the third Zubat slot at night. Tileset $09 confirmed in attributes.asm. Source: maps/UnionCaveB1F.asm.
